creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
(In reply to Jerry Jacobs from comment #7)
There is no upgrade guide just because it was supposed to be in-place upgrade.
So you just remove transmission 3, install transmission 4, point it to the previous version's directory structure and configuration file(s) and you're good to go.
But there were some issues that should be fixed in 4.0.2 and as a fail-safe measure it'll be better to make a backup of the "torrents" folder at least, to be able to safely fallback to transmission 3 in case of any problems with transmission 4.
